title: Star Wars Coop
description: A PSWG-based star wars modpack intended for player ease of use on small servers
body:
This is a modpack based on the Parzi's Star Wars:Galaxies mod, with some additions to make it more playable in survival.

It has some server-bandwidth-heavy mods like Simple Speech, and is intended for small groups of friends.  If you're after a version for a large server please consider PSWG Community Adventures instead, as it's better configured for that kind of thing than this collection.

Custom recipes are added to allow easy crafting of vehicles and lightsabers, a very lightweight shader setup is included for low powered computers.  Additional recipes to allow creation of the Star Wars specific resources are also included.

**/sethome** and **/home** commands are available for players to teleport home, as well as **/tpa** to teleport to each other, by default **Z** toggles firemode on blasters or turns lightsabers on and off (you can still slap things with the lightsaber when it's off, if you like, but that won't have much effect beyond being quite annoying indeed). **K** lets you choose a species from Star Wars and clothing if you'd rather than than your minecraft character (finally you can be a Wookiee, raaaaaarghhh!). **V** lets you configure the voice-chat, with **C** being the default for push-to-talk and **M** to mute your microphone.  **U** opens the menu for setting waypoints, so you can find your way back to villages or the Star Wars structures that spawn (where you'll find blueprints to make certain armours and weapons at the fabricator, and where you can often find tables to customize your lightsaber or blasters).
